mission: Convert DreamCo from a large collection of generated systems into one reliable operating platform.
freeze_rule: Pause major feature and division expansion until the main platform builds, starts, and passes core release checks.
current_problem: Consolidation and proof, not lack of ideas.

priorities.title: Stabilize repository
priorities.goal: Reduce PR drift, repair required CI, separate experiments from release gates, and stop automated report loops.

priorities.title: Establish the truth about every bot
priorities.goal: Make the master registry authoritative for bot IDs, implementation status, runtime, entry points, schemas, permissions, ownership, and maturity.

priorities.title: Fix public identity and documentation
priorities.goal: Correct counts, remove unsupported claims, document local-first data ownership, and publish repository maps and status pages.

priorities.title: Make Buddy the real control system
priorities.goal: Connect Buddy to registry-backed weighted routing, fallback routing, task plans, approvals, risk gates, spending gates, and cancellation.

priorities.title: Make the dashboard operational
priorities.goal: Create one official dashboard for bot fleet, divisions, failures, pull requests, cost, revenue, customers, and emergency shutdown.

priorities.title: Build trustworthy autonomy and learning
priorities.goal: Enforce autonomy levels, permissions, audit logs, memory export/delete, golden tasks, shadow testing, rollback, and evidence-based council decisions.
